results.title: llms-full.txt - Exa
results.description: * Search with contents: \$7 per 1000 requests with 10 results. ... [Exa](https://exa.ai) is the perfect web search API that finds exactly what you're looking for ...

chunks.text: Exa's search endpoint previously charged separately for search results and their webpage contents. Now, contents for 10 search results per request are included for free, and as a result API usage is cheaper for the majority of users.
